description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On October 19, 2024 at 7:57 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on Indiana Street near 19th Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked at the curb in the northbound direction of Indiana street when an SUV in front of the Waymo AV began to 
reverse to parallel park, and the rear of the SUV made contact with the front of the Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s 
Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
